title: [Device] Tuya Zigbee TS0601 Soil Moisture / Temperature Sensor (_TZE284_aa03yzhs)
excerpt:
##  Basic Information

Brand & Model:
Tuya Zigbee Smart Soil Moisture / Temperature Sensor (Plant sensor, no visible brand)

Purchase Link:
https://nl.aliexpress.com/item/1005007484918204.html

Power Source:
[x] Battery
[ ] Mains

Current Status:
[x] Pairs but missing features
[ ] Not pairing

##  Zigbee Fingerprint (MANDATORY)

Manufacturer Name:
_TZE284_aa03yzhs

Model ID:
TS0601

Endpoints:
- Endpoint 1

Clusters:
Device uses Tuya manufacturer-specific cluster 0xEF00 for data (standard for TS0601 devices).


Screenshot or fingerprint data:
modelId: TS0601
manufacturerName: _TZE284_aa03yzhs
deviceType: enddevice
ieeeAddress: a4:c1:38:88:e3:8f:74:ff
networkAddress: 19139
receiveWhenIdle: false


##  TS0601 Data Points (if applicable)

Exact DP mapping is not exposed in Homey.
This device is known to use Tuya EF00 cluster.

Based on similar TS0601 soil sensors and Zigbee2MQTT reports, expected datapoints are likely:

DP: soil moisture (%)
DP: temperature (Â°C)
DP: battery (%)

Exact DP IDs currently unknown.


##  References

Zigbee2MQTT:
This device is reported to work correctly in Zigbee2MQTT as a Tuya TS0601 soil sensor.

Other documentation:
AliExpress product page confirms Zigbee (not Wi-Fi) version and real-time sensor reporting.


##  Expected Capabilities

[ ] On/Off
[ ] Brightness / Dim
[x] Temperature
[x] Humidity / Soil moisture
[ ] Motion detection
[ ] Contact sensor
[x] Battery level
[ ] Energy monitoring
[ ] Other: Soil moisture percentage


##  Additional Notes

- Device pairs successfully with Homey Pro 2023 using local Zigbee.
- Device is currently detected as "Unknown" and only exposes a fallback on/off capability.
- No temperature, soil moisture or battery values are available.
- This is a Tuya TS0601 device using manufacturer-specific cluster 0xEF00.
- I am happy to provide additional logs or testing feedback if needed.
